gatling-maven-scaffold/pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Maven compiler release target from Java 11 to Java 21 to align with the new JDK baseline.
gatling-maven-scaffold/pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the project would compile against Java 11 bytecode, failing to utilize Java 21 features or potentially causing compatibility issues if the runtime environment strictly enforces the target version.
